text: Welcome, helper_alex! You’ve been approved as a moderator. Glad to have you aboard — please take a moment to review the community rules and moderation expectations before jumping in.
Welcome, guide_sam! You’ve been approved as an event_helper. Glad you’re here — please check the pinned onboarding info and event support guidelines when you get a minute.
Welcome, mentor_lina! You’ve been approved as a mentor. Happy to have you with us — please review the onboarding materials and mentoring expectations in the welcome resources.
